title: Broadcom VMware security advisory (AV26-681)
description: Between July 8 and 10, 2026, Broadcom published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in multiple products. Included were critical updates for the following:
products: VMware Tanzu Greenplum Command Center - multiple versions
VMware Tanzu Greenplum Data Copy Utility - versions prior to 2.9.5
VMware Tanzu Greenplum on Kubernetes - versions prior to 1.1.2
VMware Tanzu Greenplum MCP Server - version prior to 1.0.2
VMware Tanzu Greenplum Streaming Server - multiple versions
VMware Tanzu Greenplum Text - versions prior to 4.0.2
VMware Tanzu RabbitMQ on Kubernetes - multiple versions
VMware Tanzu RabbitMQ on Tanzu Platform - multiple versions
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
